prompt:
Codex Mesh message dispatched from backend.

Message ID: msg_b6a6f4628e6b4615
From: Agent System (agent-system)
To: Agente VLMKT (agente-vlmkt)
Type: request_context
Priority: normal
Subject: Bridge runner validation

Body:
Responda em uma linha confirmando que recebeu uma mensagem enviada pelo fluxo bridge-next/bridge-mark-sent do Codex Mesh.

Expected output:
Uma linha de ACK para registrar no backend.

Protocol:
- Preserve your project scope.
- Share only concise public context, decisions, interfaces, risks, and useful next steps.
- Do not edit files unless explicitly requested.
- If the answer should be shared back, keep it compact enough to write into the mesh backend.
